creator: freebsd@zilon.de
text:
In 

https://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/d9e01c35-2531-11e7-b291-b499baebfeaf.html

the current version (10.0.30_2) of the mariadb100-server port is still marked as vulnerable. Regarding to a member of the #maria channel on freenode, version 10.0.30 should already contain all fixes of the oracle mysql version 5.5.56. See also here:

https://mariadb.com/kb/en/mariadb/mariadb-10030-release-notes/
